name: Steve Katz
abstract: Steven Katz (born May 9, 1945) is an American guitarist, singer, and record producer who is best known as a member of the rock-pop-jazz group Blood, Sweat & Tears. Katz was an original member of the rock bands the Blues Project and American Flyer.

concerts.label: Music + Revolution: Greenwich Village in the 1960s

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Brecker
about_quotes.evidence: in Blood, Sweat & Tears I also learned a lot from... he had Steve Katz... somehow just doing it
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Brecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 12, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Lipsius
about_quotes.evidence: And our manager, who was Steve Katz, Steve Katz was a guitar player, his brother was our manager or lawyer, not manager, lawyer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Lipsius interviewed by Monk Rowe. Boston, Massachusetts, July 25, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Soloff
about_quotes.evidence: Everybody could read well in that band... The only one who couldn’t read well was Steve Katz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Soloff interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000
